response.justification: Aisha brings strong full-stack engineering fundamentals and 15+ years of hands-on software development across a diverse set of stacks, which meets the baseline tenure requirement. However, the role demands director-level strategic scope, recognized AI expertise, and a track record of advising enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption — none of which are substantiated in this resume. The AI exposure is confined to approximately 14 months at re:cinq (AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks), with no prior AI or ML work. There is no evidence of thought leadership at scale, published AI research, or strategic customer-facing responsibilities, and the candidate's highest title is Staff Software Engineer rather than the principal/director-level seniority the role requires.
strengths: 15+ years of continuous software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput distributed systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq demonstrates emerging AI practitioner relevance
Entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform) and a history of founding/contributing to early-stage products
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and recent (~14 months); no ML background, no demonstrated AI products at scale, no published research or recognized authority in the AI domain

No director-level or strategic IC experience — the resume shows individual contributor and staff-level work with no evidence of advising enterprise customers, shaping product strategy, or leading cross-organizational technical initiatives
Education is a BS in Computer Science plus a fine arts degree; no advanced degree in an AI-related field and no compensating executive-track credentials
